title: 1.1: Tests that determineUrlType returns ABSOLUTE when given a complete URL with protocol and host
1.2: Tests that determineUrlType returns SCHEME_RELATIVE when given a URL starting with double slashes but no protocol
1.3: Tests that determineUrlType returns PATH_ABSOLUTE when given a URL starting with a single slash
1.4: Tests that determineUrlType returns PATH_RELATIVE when given a relative path, empty string, query-only, or fragment-only string
1.5: Tests that determineUrlType returns INVALID when given non-string inputs or malformed URL patterns
2.1: Places the test for absolute URL detection in packages/calypso-url/test/
3.1: All tests use the Jest framework with test() function syntax
3.2: All tests follow the descriptive naming pattern starting with 'should'
3.3: All tests use Jest expect() with toBe() matcher for assertions
3.4: All tests import determineUrlType from the src module
